pages.title: Problem: "Chunks not unloading in CACHED mode"
pages.text: $(bold)Verification$(): $(li)Enter CACHED mode $(li)Press F3 (debug screen) $(li)Check "C:" value (total chunks loaded) $(li)Value should be lower than during SIMULATING$(br2)$(bold)If chunks still loaded$(): $(li)CM dimension may be loaded for another reason: $(li)Player inside CM dimension $(li)Another CM machine active in same dimension $(li)Chunk loader nearby$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Ensure no players in CM dimension $(li)Check for other active PreFabs/CMs $(li)Verify specific room chunks using F3 coordinates

pages.title: Problem: "Server TPS still low with PreFabs in CACHED"
pages.text: $(bold)Possible causes$(): $(li)Other lag sources (unrelated to FPSCompress) $(li)PreFabs still in SIMULATING (chunks loaded) $(li)Other mods causing lag$(br2)$(bold)Debugging$(): $(li)Use profiler (`/forge tps` or similar command) $(li)Check which dimensions are loaded $(li)Verify PreFabs are in CACHED (not SIMULATING)$(br2)---
